_documentation.description: Contenido de la página de ofertas y promociones semanales. Responsable de traducir títulos de filtros, mensajes de ofertas vacías y etiquetas en componentes EmptyOffers y OfferFilters.
_documentation.usage: Página /offers, secciones de promoción, componentes OfferFilters y EmptyOffers
_documentation.contains: Títulos de ofertas, descripciones, información de descuentos, datos SEO, textos de filtros
responsible_for: EmptyOffers component: empty.title y empty.message (cuando no hay ofertas)
OfferFilters component: filters.title, filters.all_categories, filters.info, drawer_btn_one/other
Offers page SEO: seo.title, seo.description, seo.json_ld_name, seo.json_ld_description
_documentation.usage_pattern: t('offers:{{key}}') o t('offers:filters.{{key}}') para acceso anidado

seo.title: Offers and Promotions
seo.description: Discover the best offers and promotions at Superior Hypermarket. Save on quality products with exclusive discounts on food, drinks, cleaning supplies, and more.
seo.json_ld_description: Catalog of active offers and promotions with exclusive discounts on quality products.

empty.title: No offers available
empty.message: Select another category or try again later
